masthead.headline: Investigation Tools
masthead.subtitle: Data, methodology and guides for investigative journalists

featured.label: FEATURED STORY
featured.statSuffix: direct awards in 2023 — highest year in 23 years

methodology.title: Methodology & Data
methodology.description: RUBLI analyzes 3 million federal contracts (2002-2025) with an ML model trained on 748 documented corruption cases. Open source, verifiable data.
methodology.tooltipBody: Logistic regression with 16 z-scores, 13 sector sub-models, AUC=0.840. Trained with 748 documented corruption cases. PU-learning (Elkan & Noto 2008).
